---
title: "DeepSeek — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import json
import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "DeepSeek"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"):
    p = PROCESSED / f"deepseek_{table}.parquet"
    if p.exists():
        con.execute(f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{p}')")

# DeepSeek brand: blue royal
SOURCE_COLOR = "#3B82F6"
SECONDARY = "#1E3A8A"
ACCENT = "#0F172A"
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets gerados pelo
> parser canonico do DeepSeek (`src/parsers/deepseek.py`). Apresenta o que
> esta nos dados — schema, cobertura, distribuicoes, preservation. **Nao
> interpreta** conteudo. Pra analise qualitativa, ver projeto
> `~/Desktop/AI Interaction Analysis/`.
>
> Fonte: pasta unica cumulativa `data/merged/DeepSeek/`. Schema canonico
> v3 cobre: R1 reasoning (`thinking`) com cobertura significativa,
> `accumulated_token_usage` per msg, `pinned`/`is_archived` cross-platform,
> branches via `parent_id` (forks de regenerate).

# 1. Dados disponiveis

## 1.1 Conversations

Cada linha eh uma chat session do DeepSeek. `mode` mapeia de `agent` +
`model_type`: `chat` (default), `research` (`expert`/R1 reasoner). DeepSeek
nao tem projects/spaces.

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(is_pinned::INT) AS pinned,
        SUM(is_archived::INT) AS archived,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen,
        COUNT(settings_json) AS with_settings
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "UUID do session", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'deepseek'", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome da session (servidor preenche)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Quando criada (epoch float)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Servidor bumpa em rename + pin (validado empirico)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "user + assistant messages", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "DeepSeek nao expoe `model` no schema (sempre NULL)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "chat / research (R1 reasoner em sessions de model_type='expert')", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_pinned", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Pin na sidebar (cross-platform)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['pinned'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_archived", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Schema canonico — DeepSeek nao expoe archive na UI atual", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['archived'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se conv sumiu do servidor (preservada local)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen")},
    {"Campo": "settings_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON com `thinking_elapsed_total_secs` agregado de R1 sessions", "Cobertura": conv_cov("with_settings")},
])
show_df(schema_conv)
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    pinned_one AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_pinned LIMIT 1
    ),
    research_mode AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode = 'research' LIMIT 1
    ),
    chat_mode AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE mode = 'chat' ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    preserved AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_preserved_missing LIMIT 1
    ),
    longest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    shortest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0 ORDER BY message_count ASC LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 50) AS title,
        mode, message_count AS msgs,
        is_pinned, is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM pinned_one
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM research_mode
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM chat_mode
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM preserved
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM shortest
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

R1 reasoner expoe `thinking_content` em msgs assistant — captado em
`thinking`. Token usage acumulado per-msg (`accumulated_token_usage`)
populado em quase 100% das msgs.

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT(thinking) AS thinking,
        COUNT(token_count) AS token_count,
        COUNT(citations_json) AS citations_json,
        COUNT(attachments_json) AS attachments_json,
        COUNT(attachment_names) AS attachment_names,
        COUNT(finish_reason) AS finish_reason
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "UUID da msg (ou int id no schema legacy)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra branches", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem cronologica", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant' (mapeado de USER/ASSISTANT)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Texto da msg (sem reasoning)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "thinking", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "R1 `thinking_content` — feature distintiva DeepSeek (~31% das msgs)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("thinking")},
    {"Campo": "token_count", "Tipo": "int?", "Descricao": "`accumulated_token_usage` per-msg", "Cobertura": msg_cov("token_count")},
    {"Campo": "citations_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON de search_results citados (estrutura rica)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("citations_json")},
    {"Campo": "attachments_json", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON de feedback / tips / ban_edit / thinking_elapsed_secs", "Cobertura": msg_cov("attachments_json")},
    {"Campo": "attachment_names", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Files anexados", "Cobertura": msg_cov("attachment_names")},
    {"Campo": "finish_reason", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Mapeado de `status`: stop / incomplete / wip", "Cobertura": msg_cov("finish_reason")},
])
show_df(schema_msg)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_no_think AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' AND thinking IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    asst_thinking AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL ORDER BY length(thinking) DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_citations AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE citations_json IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    ),
    incomplete AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE finish_reason = 'incomplete' LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT
        substr(message_id, 1, 12) AS msg_id,
        role,
        substr(content, 1, 50) AS content_preview,
        word_count AS wc,
        token_count AS tokens,
        thinking IS NOT NULL AS has_thinking,
        citations_json IS NOT NULL AS has_citations,
        finish_reason
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_no_think
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM asst_thinking
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_citations
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM incomplete
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

DeepSeek expoe `search_results` per-msg em chats com search habilitado.
O parser emite `search_call` + `search_result` events. **Nao tem code
execution / artifacts / image gen** no schema atual.

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json,
        COUNT(result) AS result
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
etotal = ecov["total"].iloc[0]

def evt_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(ecov[field].iloc[0]), int(etotal))

schema_evt = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<msg_id>_search_call` ou `_result`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID da msg origem", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "search_call / search_result", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "'web_search'", "Cobertura": evt_cov("tool_name")},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "JSON com result_count + agent + model_type", "Cobertura": evt_cov("metadata_json")},
    {"Campo": "result", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "JSON dos results em events `_result`", "Cobertura": evt_cov("result")},
])
show_df(schema_evt)
```

```{python}
#| label: evt-sample

sample_evt = con.execute("""
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (event_type)
        event_type, tool_name,
        substr(metadata_json, 1, 80) AS metadata_preview
    FROM tool_events ORDER BY event_type
""").df()
show_df(sample_evt)
```

## 1.4 Branches

Branches DeepSeek vem de regenerate da resposta (`parent_id` per msg gera
fork). 271 branches em 79 sessions = **~2.4 branches/conv** — muito acima
de outras plataformas. DeepSeek tem MUITO regenerate.

```{python}
#| label: br-schema

bcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS active,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NULL)::INT) AS main,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS forks
    FROM branches
""").df()

schema_br = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv>_main` ou `<conv>_<root_msg_id>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "root_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Primeira msg da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "leaf_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Ultima msg da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_active", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Branch contem `current_message_id` da session", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['active'].iloc[0]):,} (1 por session)"},
    {"Campo": "parent_branch_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "NULL pra main; aponta pra main em forks", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['forks'].iloc[0])} forks / {int(bcov['main'].iloc[0])} main"},
])
show_df(schema_br)
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

## 2.1 Convs sem `model`

DeepSeek **nao expoe model na API** — sempre NULL no schema. Schema
canonico mantem o campo pra consistencia cross-platform.

```{python}
#| label: model-gap

print("DeepSeek nao expoe model name na API — campo Conversation.model "
      "fica NULL pra todas. Pra distinguir entre R1 reasoner e chat regular, "
      "usar `mode` ('research' vs 'chat').")
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de R1 reasoning (`thinking`)

R1 thinking eh **a feature distintiva do DeepSeek**. Cobertura alta
indica uso intensivo de R1 reasoner.

```{python}
#| label: thinking-coverage

think_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(thinking) AS com_thinking,
        ROUND(COUNT(thinking) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(think_cov)
```

```{python}
#| label: thinking-by-mode

think_by_mode = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        c.mode,
        COUNT(m.message_id) AS total_msgs,
        COUNT(m.thinking) AS com_thinking,
        ROUND(COUNT(m.thinking) * 100.0 / COUNT(m.message_id), 1) AS pct
    FROM messages m
    JOIN conversations c USING(conversation_id)
    WHERE m.role='assistant'
    GROUP BY c.mode ORDER BY c.mode
""").df()
show_df(think_by_mode)
```

## 2.3 Token count coverage

`accumulated_token_usage` populado per-msg.

```{python}
#| label: token-coverage

tok_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(token_count) AS com_token,
        ROUND(COUNT(token_count) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct,
        ROUND(AVG(token_count), 0) AS avg_tokens,
        MAX(token_count) AS max_tokens
    FROM messages
    GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(tok_cov)
```

## 2.4 finish_reason — incomplete vs stop

```{python}
#| label: finish-reason

fr = con.execute("""
    SELECT finish_reason, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM messages WHERE finish_reason IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY finish_reason ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(fr)
```

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
                 title="Conversations criadas por mes", height=350)
fig.update_xaxes(type="category")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: roles

roles = con.execute("""
    SELECT role, COUNT(*) AS n FROM messages GROUP BY role ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=roles["role"], y=roles["n"], title="Messages por role", height=300)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 Mode (chat vs research)

```{python}
#| label: modes

modes = con.execute("""
    SELECT mode, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mode ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = px.pie(modes, values="n", names="mode",
             title="Conversations por mode",
             color_discrete_sequence=[SOURCE_COLOR, SECONDARY],
             height=350)
fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
fig.show()
show_df(modes)
```

## 3.4 ToolEvents por event_type

```{python}
#| label: tool-events

evts = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, tool_name, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type, tool_name ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

if not evts.empty:
    fig = plotly_bar(x=evts["event_type"], y=evts["n"],
                     title="ToolEvents por event_type", height=300)
    fig.show()
show_df(evts)
```

## 3.5 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: conv-size

sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT message_count FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0
""").df()

bins = [0, 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 9999]
labels = ["1", "2", "3-5", "6-10", "11-20", "21-50", "51-100", "100+"]
sizes["bin"] = pd.cut(sizes["message_count"], bins=bins, labels=labels, include_lowest=True)
hist = sizes["bin"].value_counts().reindex(labels).reset_index()
hist.columns = ["bin", "n"]

fig = plotly_bar(x=hist["bin"].astype(str), y=hist["n"],
                 title=f"Distribuicao de msgs por conv (n={len(sizes):,})", height=300)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.6 Branches: forks por session (regenerate)

```{python}
#| label: forks

forks = con.execute("""
    SELECT n_branches, COUNT(*) AS n_convs FROM (
        SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(*) AS n_branches
        FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id
    ) GROUP BY n_branches ORDER BY n_branches
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(x=forks["n_branches"].astype(str), y=forks["n_convs"],
                 title="Branches por session (regenerate count)",
                 color=SECONDARY, height=300)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N branches")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N sessions")
fig.show()
```

## 3.7 Token usage — distribuicao

```{python}
#| label: token-distrib

tok_dist = con.execute("""
    SELECT token_count
    FROM messages
    WHERE token_count IS NOT NULL AND token_count > 0
""").df()

if not tok_dist.empty:
    fig = px.histogram(tok_dist, x="token_count",
                       title=f"Distribuicao de token_count (n={len(tok_dist):,})",
                       color_discrete_sequence=[SOURCE_COLOR],
                       nbins=40, height=350)
    fig.update_layout(template="plotly_white", margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20))
    fig.show()
```

# 4. Preservation + features distintivas

## 4.1 Pinned (cross-platform)

```{python}
#| label: pinned-detail

pinned_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        mode,
        message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_pinned = TRUE
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

if not pinned_table.empty:
    show_df(pinned_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv pinada.")
```

## 4.2 Preservation — convs sumidas do servidor

```{python}
#| label: preserved-detail

preserved_table = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(last_seen_in_server, '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_seen,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_preserved_missing = TRUE
    ORDER BY last_seen_in_server DESC
""").df()

if not preserved_table.empty:
    show_df(preserved_table)
else:
    print("Nenhuma conv preservada.")
```

## 4.3 R1 reasoner — exemplos de thinking

```{python}
#| label: r1-samples
#| column: page

r1_samples = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        substr(content, 1, 50) AS msg_preview,
        substr(thinking, 1, 100) AS thinking_preview,
        length(thinking) AS thinking_chars,
        token_count
    FROM messages
    WHERE thinking IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY length(thinking) DESC
    LIMIT 5
""").df()
show_df(r1_samples)
```

# 5. Limitacoes conhecidas

| Item | Status |
|---|---|
| `model` field | DeepSeek nao expoe na API — sempre NULL. Distincao via `mode` (chat / research) |
| Archive na UI | Nao existe atualmente; campo `is_archived` no schema canonico fica sempre False |
| Files / multi-modal | Schema tem `attachment_names`, mas nao exercitado em produndidade |
| Voice / TTS | Nao identificado |
| Citations estrutura | Schema tem `citations_json` com title/url/metadata — formato proprio do DeepSeek |
